lockedDecisions.question: Which services are toggle-able?
lockedDecisions.decision: All four: Walmart, Spoonacular, Open Food Facts, SerpAPI.

lockedDecisions.question: What happens when all are off?
lockedDecisions.decision: Keep Search online tab visible; show empty-state message + link to Settings to enable sources.

lockedDecisions.question: Default states?
lockedDecisions.decision: Walmart on; Spoonacular, Open Food Facts, SerpAPI off.

lockedDecisions.question: How are search results rendered?
lockedDecisions.decision: Per-service sections with a label heading per source. Edge function returns grouped response: { groups: [{ source, label, results }] }.

consistencyFixes: S-5: searchImages always returns an array; cache key includes sources string
S-4: deployment order note added — must release atomically with S-5 and S-7
Out of scope: removed contradictory item about not showing source labels
S-2: snake_case to camelCase mapping explicitly called out in flow chart
S-6 AC#5: removed self-contradictory CodingKeys note; clarified no CodingKeys needed
resumePrompt: Resume Concepture-Planner session planner-1780058228-a3f9b2. Active PRD draft: docs/drafts/prd-image-search-source-toggles.md. Feature: per-user image search source toggles in Settings (React web + Swift iOS). Preferences stored as JSONB column image_search_settings on profiles. Defaults: walmart=true, others=false. All four services toggle-able. When all off, keep Search online tab but show empty-state message + link to Settings. Results rendered in per-service sections; edge function returns grouped response { groups }. 7 stories (S-1 through S-7). Consistency pass completed and all 6 fixes applied. Awaiting R to mark ready.
